name: Lawrie Conway
background: Mr. Conway was appointed as Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director on 1 January 2023. He was previously Finance Director and Chief Financial Officer since 2014. He has more than 30 years’ experience in the resources sector across a diverse range of commercial, financial and operational activities.
